title: OpenAI steps into the living room: Screen-free smart speaker sinks Sonos shares
summary: Investing.com -- OpenAI is officially stepping out of the browser and into the physical world. According to a Tuesday report from Bloomberg News, the AI juggernaut is developing a mobile, screen-free smart speaker, marking its highly anticipated debut in the consumer hardware space. The announcement sent immediate ripples through the tech and audio markets.
